name: typescript-express-multi-agent
description: Express + TypeScript + SQLite project config for both Claude Code and Cursor — demonstrates multi-agent setup sharing on the same project

files.description: Node.js project manifest — shared between all agents
Project README — shared between all agents
Project instructions for Claude Code
Claude Code project-level permissions and model preferences
Claude Code /review slash command
Claude Code /test-coverage slash command
Pre-commit hook: lint, type-check, and test staged files
Teaches Claude Code the project's Express API conventions
MCP server config for Claude Code (filesystem, fetch, sqlite)
Legacy Cursor root-level rules (kept for backward compatibility)
Files excluded from Cursor AI access
Large generated files excluded from Cursor's codebase index
MDC rule: TypeScript conventions (always applied)
MDC rule: Express API patterns (scoped to routes/controllers)
MDC rule: Vitest testing conventions (scoped to test files)
MCP server config for Cursor (filesystem, fetch)
Cursor lifecycle hooks (eslint auto-fix, shell logging)
Cursor /review slash command
Cursor /test-coverage slash command
Cursor /refactor slash command
Teaches Cursor the project's Express API conventions
